subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1915
subcodes.first_line: Together with Áqa Mírza Haydar-‘Alí, we went for a stroll. We saw a large multitude going up the mountain, as the next evening was a festivity in honor of Saint Elijah
subcodes.first_line_orig: رفتیم با آقا میرزا حیدر علی بگردیم دیدیم جمعیت زیادی روبه کوه میروند فردا شب عید مارالیاس است
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @empty learning; false spirituality, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
